testcase.name: test_incident_create_with_location_persists

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='medical-ops-control.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)

testcase.failure:
E TimeoutError: The read operation timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='medical-ops-control.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)

testcase.name: test_resource_create_accepts_location_and_fms

failure.message: AssertionError: lat not persisted on create: {'id': '02387e95-518e-4813-aafe-dfafd7c4837d', 'incident_id': '657338d7-2953-47b8-b88f-08e4f0eace4f', 'name': 'TEST_RTW_MAP', 'typ': 'intern', 'kategorie': 'rtw', 'status': 'verfuegbar', 'notiz': '', 'abschnitt_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-05-15T18:58:33.008889+00:00', 'updated_at': '2026-05-15T18:58:33.008889+00:00'} assert None == 53.55 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb3b2bdc400>('lat') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb3b2bdc400> = {'abschnitt_id': None, 'created_at': '2026-05-15T18:58:33.008889+00:00', 'id': '02387e95-518e-4813-aafe-dfafd7c4837d', 'incident_id': '657338d7-2953-47b8-b88f-08e4f0eace4f', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_resource_unplace_clears_lat_lng

failure.message: Failed: PATCH cannot clear lat/lng because exclude_none=True drops nulls. Unplace flow will be broken.

testcase.failure: E Failed: PATCH cannot clear lat/lng because exclude_none=True drops nulls. Unplace flow will be broken.
